payload.title: Verify the full GitHub OAuth callback round-trip (integration test)
payload.description: The live github.com round-trip has never run for real. Close the code-verification gap: an integration test that drives GET /auth/login -> GET /auth/callback against a STUBBED GitHub (token exchange + /user + /user/emails injected), asserting it upserts the account, sets the scope_session cookie, redirects to /app, and that the cookie then authenticates /api/meta. Leaves only the actual github.com network as the (deploy-time) unknown.
